imageframeclient.midnightconfig.title: ImageFrame Client Settings
imageframeclient.midnightconfig.useNativ: Use Native Resolution and Full Color Map Images
Use native resolution and full color map images sent from the server.
imageframeclient.midnightconfig.maxImage: The maximum pixels a map can have on each side.
imageframeclient.midnightconfig.previewM: Preview maps when you hover over them in your inventory.
imageframeclient.midnightconfig.notifyWh: Notify when Server Supports ImageFrame Client
Show a toast message when you join a server if they support ImageFrame client.
message.server_supported.title: ImageFrame Client Supported Server
message.server_supported.description: This server has ImageFrame and will show images in native resolution and full color!
